title: Portugal Residence Permit Requerimento (Modelo 1) — Grant, Renewal, Long-Term Resident Status, Investment Residence Permit, EU Blue Card, Family Reunification, Data Change, or Duplicate
description: The general-purpose application ("Requerimento", Modelo 1) a non-EU/EEA foreign national files with the Agência para a Integração, Migrações e Asilo (AIMA), Portugal's migration and asylum agency, to request a grant or renewal of a temporary or permanent Autorização de Residência (residence permit), an Estatuto de Residente de Longa Duração (long-term resident status), an Autorização de Residência para Investimento (ARI, the investment-based residence permit commonly known as the "golden visa"), an EU Blue Card, or family reunification under Lei n.º 23/2007, de 4 de julho (the Foreigners' Law); or, on the same form, to request a data change or a duplicate/second copy of an already-issued title. Scoped to the fields an applicant supplies; excludes the form's own agency-reserved administrative boxes ("A preencher pelos Serviços": Loja AIMA, Entrada n.º, NIE, MC) and its final page's staff-only document-authenticity certification, both filled exclusively by AIMA case officers. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Portugal or the Agência para a Integração, Migrações e Asilo.

authority.name: Agência para a Integração, Migrações e Asilo, I.P.

source.documentRef: Modelo 1 — REQUERIMENTO (application form for residence-permit grant, renewal, status, data change, or duplicate)

verification.notes: GOV-1757: closes Portugal's Visa/residence-status gap, a candidate GOV-1750 had explicitly flagged as a genuine open backlog item rather than a dead end. Confirmed directly this cycle via a fresh curl fetch of AIMA's own official document URL (200 OK, ~252 KB PDF) and cross-verified that this exact URL is the one directly linked from AIMA's own public "Impressos e Minutas" forms index page (https://aima.gov.pt/pt/impressos-e-minutas). pdfjs-dist extraction confirms 0 AcroForm widgets across all 4 pages — a flat, non-fillable PDF, the same source-shape tier as AT's Modelo 3 IRS return already documented for Portugal's Taxes vertical. GOV-1760 review found this record's prior draft cited two additional URLs (a legacy sef.pt mirror and an alternative aima.gov.pt path) as independently byte-verified; both were re-checked at merge time, both 404, and neither has any Wayback Machine history — they have been removed from the sourcing record as unconfirmed/likely erroneous. See VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing record, field-by-field citations, and every disclosed scope decision.

fields.name: requestCategory
fields.label: Type of request
fields.description: Which of Modelo 1's two main tracks this submission is: a new grant, renewal, or specific residence-status request (the form's "Venho requerer" section), or a change of data on, or a duplicate of, an already-issued title (the form's "Alteração de dados / Segunda via" section).
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.1, "Venho requerer:" section header; p.2, "Alteração de dados / Segunda via de A. R. / E.R.L.D. / A.R.I. / Cartão Azul U.E." section header

fields.name: requestType
fields.label: Venho requerer (I hereby request)
fields.description: The specific residence-status transaction requested, one of the seven lines printed under "Venho requerer:". Modelled as a single choice: the source presents these as an unlabelled checkbox list with no confirmed mutual-exclusivity marker (the same kind of uncertainty this registry has disclosed before for other checkbox grids, e.g. `pt/imt/requerimento-carta-de-conducao`'s `licenceCategory`), but in practice an applicant pursues one specific immigration pathway per submission.
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.1, "Venho requerer:", the seven lines: "Concessão de A.R. TEMPORÁRIA/PERMANENTE", "Renovação de A.R. TEMPORÁRIA/PERMANENTE", "Concessão/Renovação de E.R.L.D.", "Concessão/Renovação de A.R.I.", "Concessão de A.R.I. Permanente", "Concessão/Renovação de Cartão Azul UE", "Reagrupamento Familiar" — each citing an article of Lei n.º 23/2007, de 4 de julho

fields.name: residencePermitDuration
fields.label: Temporária / Permanente (temporary / permanent)
fields.description: Whether the ordinary Autorização de Residência being requested or renewed is temporary or permanent, printed as "TEMPORÁRIA / PERMANENTE" on both the Concessão and Renovação lines.
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.1, "Venho requerer:", "Concessão de A.R. TEMPORÁRIA / PERMANENTE..." and "Renovação de A.R. TEMPORÁRIA / PERMANENTE..." lines

fields.name: familyReunificationBeneficiaryName
fields.label: A favor de (in favor of)
fields.description: The name of the Portugal-based family member (the "anchor" resident) through whom family reunification is being requested.
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.1, "Reagrupamento Familiar nos termos do n.º __ do art.º __ da Lei 23/2007..., a favor de ____"

fields.name: familyRelationship
fields.label: Vínculo Familiar (family relationship)
fields.description: The family relationship between the applicant and the beneficiary named above (e.g. spouse, minor child, dependent parent).
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.1, "...a favor de ____ (Vínculo Familiar)"

fields.name: legalBasisArticle
fields.label: Nos termos do art.º (under article)
fields.description: The specific article (and, for family reunification, paragraph) of Lei n.º 23/2007, de 4 de julho, the applicant cites as the legal basis for the request. The form prints a blank "nos termos do art.º ___" after each of the six non-family-reunification request lines and a two-part "n.º ___ do art.º ___" after the family-reunification line — the same kind of blank repeated per request type, not one this schema attempts to pre-populate: Lei 23/2007 carries dozens of distinct grant grounds (e.g. Art. 77 general grounds, Art. 88/89/90 subordinate/independent/highly-qualified work, Art. 91 entrepreneurs, Art. 98 family reunification), and which one applies is a case-specific legal determination the applicant or their representative makes, not a fixed enumerable list this document fabricates. Left as one free-text field, not required, since the printed form gives applicants a blank rather than a mandated citation.
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.1, "nos termos do art.º ___ da Lei 23/2007, de 4 de julho, na sua atual versão" (repeated after each of six request lines); "nos termos do n.º ___ do art.º ___ da Lei 23/2007" (Reagrupamento Familiar line); p.2, "nos termos do art.º ___ da Lei 23/2007" (Alteração de dados / Segunda via header)

fields.name: diplomaticRepresentation
fields.label: Representação Diplomática Portuguesa
fields.description: When the request involves applying for a Visto de Residência (residence visa) at a Portuguese diplomatic mission abroad, the specific embassy or consulate through which the applicant is proceeding.
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.1, "Havendo lugar à solicitação de Visto de Residência indico como Representação Diplomática Portuguesa ____"

fields.name: dataChangeReason
fields.label: Reason for data change / duplicate
fields.description: The reason for the data change or duplicate/second-copy request, one of five printed checkbox options.
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.2, "Alteração de dados / Segunda via...": "Mau estado", "Extravio / Furto", "Morada", "Estado civil", "Outro"

fields.name: dataChangeReasonOtherDetail
fields.label: Outro — detail
fields.description: Free-text detail of the data-change reason, required whenever "Outro" is marked.

fields.name: fullName
fields.label: Nome / Name / Nom
fields.description: The applicant's full name.
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.1, "1. Nome / Name / Nom"

fields.name: fatherName
fields.label: Filiação (Pai / Father / Père)
fields.description: The applicant's father's name, as recorded in the "Filiação" (parentage) field.
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.1, "2. Filiação: (Pai, Father, Père), (Mãe, Mother, Mère),"

fields.name: motherName
fields.label: Filiação (Mãe / Mother / Mère)
fields.description: The applicant's mother's name, as recorded in the "Filiação" (parentage) field.
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.1, "2. Filiação: (Pai, Father, Père), (Mãe, Mother, Mère),"

fields.name: nationality
fields.label: Nacionalidade (País) / Nationality (Country)
fields.description: The applicant's nationality (country).
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.1, "3. Nacionalidade (País) / Nationality (Country) / Nationalité (Pays)"

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Data de Nascimento / Date of Birth
fields.description: The applicant's date of birth.
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.1, "4. Data de Nascimento / Date of Birth / Date de Naissance"

fields.name: sex
fields.label: Sexo / Sex / Sexe
fields.description: The applicant's sex, as printed on the form's own two-option "M / F" checkbox.
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.1, "5. Sexo / Sex / Sexe: M F"

fields.name: maritalStatus
fields.label: Estado Civil / Marital Status
fields.description: The applicant's marital status. The form provides a blank line rather than a fixed set of options, so no enum is asserted.
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.1, "6. Estado Civil / Marital Status / État Civil"

fields.name: permanentAddress
fields.label: Endereço Permanente / Permanent Address
fields.description: The applicant's permanent postal address (street, number, and floor/unit as applicable).
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.1, "7. Endereço Permanente / Permanent Address / Adress"

fields.name: permanentAddressLocality
fields.label: Localidade / Location
fields.description: Continuation line of the applicant's permanent address (locality/city), immediately below the street-address line.
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.1, "Localidade / Location / Localité"

fields.name: postalCode
fields.label: Código Postal / Postal Code
fields.description: The postal code for the permanent address. Unlike `pt/imt/requerimento-carta-de-conducao`'s postal code, no digit-count pattern is asserted here: this form's applicant pool is broader than a domestic-only DMV process (it explicitly contemplates applicants proceeding via a Portuguese diplomatic mission abroad, i.e. a foreign address), so a Portugal-specific NNNN-NNN pattern is not enforced.
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.1, "Código Postal / Postal Code / Code Postal: ___ - ___"

fields.name: telephone
fields.label: Telefone / Telephone
fields.description: The applicant's telephone number.
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.1, "8. Telefone / Telephone"

fields.name: email
fields.label: E-mail
fields.description: The applicant's email address. Per the form's own DECLARAÇÃO section, this is the address to which AIMA sends all procedural communications, including the final decision (see `communicationsByEmailDeclaration` in `documents[]`).
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.1, "9. E-mail"

fields.name: passportNumber
fields.label: Passaporte N.º / Passport No.
fields.description: The number of the applicant's passport.
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.1, "10. Passaporte N.º / Passport No. / Passeporte No"

fields.name: passportIssuedBy
fields.label: Emitido em / Issued by
fields.description: The authority or country that issued the applicant's passport.
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.1, "Emitido em / Issued by / Passe à"

fields.name: passportIssueDate
fields.label: Data de Emissão / Date of Issue
fields.description: The issue date of the applicant's passport.
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.1, "Data de Emissão / Date of Issue / Délivree le"

fields.name: passportExpiryDate
fields.label: Data de Validade / Expiry Date
fields.description: The expiry date of the applicant's passport.
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.1, "Data de Validade / Expiry Date / Valable Jusqu'au"

fields.name: consentToDataExchange
fields.label: Autorizo / Não Autorizo (data-exchange consent)
fields.description: The applicant's binary declaration on whether AIMA may exchange their information with the Portuguese tax authority (Finanças) and Social Security, and consult the Portuguese criminal record, to assess the request. The form prints both the affirmative and negative declarations as parallel numbered items (2 and 3) rather than a single yes/no checkbox, but they are mutually exclusive alternative statements the applicant selects between.
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.3, DECLARAÇÃO items 2–3: "Declaro que Autorizo a AIMA I.P. a trocar informação..." / "Declaro que Não Autorizo a AIMA I.P. a trocar informação..."

fields.name: placeOfSigning
fields.label: Local (place of signing)
fields.description: The place where the applicant signs and dates the request, in the closing "Pede deferimento" line.
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.2, "Pede deferimento: ___ , __ / __ / ____ (nome, data)"

fields.name: dateOfRequest
fields.label: Data (date of signing)
fields.description: The date the applicant signs and submits the request.
fields.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.2, "Pede deferimento: ___ , __ / __ / ____ (nome, data)"

documents.label: Passaporte ou outro documento de viagem válido (valid passport or other travel document)
documents.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.2, "Foram apresentados os seguintes documentos:" checklist

documents.label: IRS (comprovativo de situação fiscal — proof of income-tax filing/status)
documents.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.2, "Foram apresentados os seguintes documentos:" checklist, "IRS"

documents.label: Meios de Subsistência (proof of means of subsistence)
documents.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.2, "Foram apresentados os seguintes documentos:" checklist, "Meios de Subsistência"

documents.label: Seguro de Saúde / SNS (health insurance or National Health Service registration)
documents.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.2, "Foram apresentados os seguintes documentos:" checklist, "Seguro de Saúde/SNS"

documents.label: Alojamento (proof of accommodation)
documents.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.2, "Foram apresentados os seguintes documentos:" checklist, "Alojamento"

documents.label: Comprovativo de Conhecimento de Português Básico (proof of basic Portuguese-language proficiency)
documents.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.2, "Foram apresentados os seguintes documentos:" checklist, "Comprovativo de Conhecimento de Português Básico"

documents.label: Applicant's declaration of accuracy and good faith
documents.statement: Declaro prestar estas informações de boa fé e que as mesmas são exatas e corretas. Qualquer declaração falsa da minha parte implicará a não apreciação deste pedido, sem prejuízo das ações previstas pela legislação em vigor;
documents.issuingAuthority: Self-attested by the applicant, signed within the form's Assinatura/Signature block
documents.sourceRef: Modelo 1 p.3, DECLARAÇÃO item 1; Assinatura/Signature block

documents.label: Applicant's acceptance of email-based communications
documents.statement: Declaro aceitar que todas as comunicações no âmbito do procedimento são efetuadas por email para o endereço supra indicado, incluindo a decisão final e eventuais notificações para abandono voluntário, em conformidade com o artigo 112.º n.ºs 1 c) e 2 b) do Código do Procedimento Administrativo (CPA);
documents.issuingAuthority: Self-attested by the applicant, signed within the form's Assinatura/Signature block

documents.label: Applicant's acceptance of the declared domicile for legal notifications
documents.statement: Declaro aceitar que o domicílio comunicado neste requerimento inicial fica convencionado para todos os devidos e legais efeitos, valendo para toda e qualquer notificação, salvo atualização efetuada nos registos AIMA;
documents.issuingAuthority: Self-attested by the applicant, signed within the form's Assinatura/Signature block

steps.title: Alteração de dados / Segunda via (data change / duplicate)
